css: *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{font-family:sans-serif;background:#0a0e17;color:#e0e0e0;min-height:100vh}.grid-bg{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(59,130,246,.03)1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(59,130,246,.03)1px,transparent 1px);background-size:60px 60px;animation:gM 20s linear infinite;z-index:0}@keyframes gM{0%{transform:translate(0,0)}100%{transform:translate(60px,60px)}}.orb{position:fixed;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);opacity:.15;z-index:0}.o1{width:400px;height:400px;background:#3b82f6;top:-100px;right:-100px;animation:oF 15s ease-in-out infinite}.o2{width:350px;height:350px;background:#8b5cf6;bottom:-80px;left:-80px;animation:oF 15s ease-in-out infinite -5s}.o3{width:300px;height:300px;background:#06b6d4;top:40%;left:40%;animation:oF 15s ease-in-out infinite -10s}@keyframes oF{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)scale(1)}33%{transform:translate(30px,-20px)scale(1.1)}66%{transform:translate(-20px,30px)scale(.9)}}.app{position:relative;z-index:1;padding:20px;max-width:1300px;margin:0 auto}.header{text-align:center;padding:30px 0 20px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.5);margin-bottom:25px}.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(59,130,246,.15),rgba(139,92,246,.15));border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,.3);border-radius:30px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:.8em;color:#06b6d4;margin-bottom:15px}.pulse{width:8px;height:8px;background:#10b981;border-radius:50%;animation:pls 2s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes pls{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.7}}h1{font-size:2.2em;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#06b6d4,#8b5cf6);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;margin-bottom:8px}.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:15px;margin-bottom:25px}.stat{background:rgba(17,24,39,.8);border:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.5);border-radius:16px;padding:20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:.3s;position:relative}.stat:hover{border-color:#3b82f6;transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(59,130,246,.15)}.sv{font-size:2em;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace}.sv.b{color:#3b82f6}.sv.g{color:#10b981}.sv.c{color:#06b6d4}.sv.p{color:#8b5cf6}.sl{font-size:.85em;color:#9ca3af;margin-top:5px}.grid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;margin-bottom:25px}.panel{background:rgba(17,24,39,.8);border:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.5);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:25px}.ph{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.5);font-weight:600}.pb{padding:20px}.modal-overlay{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);z-index:100;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}.modal-overlay.active{display:flex}.modal{background:#111827;border:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.6);border-radius:20px;width:90%;max-width:680px;max-height:80vh;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5);animation:modalIn .3s ease}@keyframes modalIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.95)translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)translateY(0)}}.modal-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:20px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.5)}.modal-header h2{font-size:1.2em}.modal-close{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);background:transparent;color:#9ca3af;font-size:1.2em;cursor:pointer}.modal-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff}.modal-body{max-height:calc(80vh - 75px);overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 24px}.detail-item{display:flex;gap:14px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.3);border-radius:12px}.detail-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-color:rgba(59,130,246,.3)}.detail-icon{font-size:1.4em;width:40px;height:40px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:10px;flex-shrink:0}.di-blue{background:rgba(59,130,246,.15)}.di-green{background:rgba(16,185,129,.15)}.di-purple{background:rgba(139,92,246,.15)}.di-orange{background:rgba(245,158,11,.15)}.di-pink{background:rgba(236,72,153,.15)}.di-cyan{background:rgba(6,182,212,.15)}.detail-info{flex:1}.detail-info .dt{font-weight:600;font-size:.95em;margin-bottom:4px}.detail-info .dm{font-size:.8em;color:#9ca3af}.detail-status{font-size:.75em;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:600;align-self:flex-start}.ds-ok{background:rgba(16,185,129,.15);color:#10b981}.ds-warn{background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);color:#f59e0b}.ds-info{background:rgba(59,130,246,.15);color:#3b82f6}.cap-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:12px}.cap-card{background:rgba(17,24,39,.6);border:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.5);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;text-align:center;transition:.3s}.cap-card:hover{border-color:#8b5cf6;transform:translateY(-3px)}.cap-card .ci{font-size:1.8em;margin-bottom:8px}.cap-card .cn{font-weight:600;font-size:.9em;margin-bottom:4px}.cap-card .cd{font-size:.75em;color:#9ca3af}.arch-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:25px}.arch-node{background:rgba(17,24,39,.9);border:1px solid rgba(55,65,81,.5);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 20px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;min-width:110px;transition:.3s}.arch-node:hover{border-color:#06b6d4;transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(6,182,212,.3)}.arch-arrow{color:#3b82f6;font-size:1.4em;animation:aP 2s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes aP{0%,100%{opacity:.4}50%{opacity:1}}footer{text-align:center;padding:40px 0 30px;color:#556677;font-size:.85em}@media(max-width:768px){.stats,.grid2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.arch-row{flex-direction:column}.arch-arrow{transform:rotate(90deg)}}
